title: Correlation IDs absent — itself a High-severity Observability finding
scenario: Production logs lack trace_id, request_id, and any cross-service correlation field. The investigation cannot reconstruct user journeys.
expected_finding: Skill must raise a High-severity Observability finding for the absence of correlation IDs, recommend (in order of effort) edge-injected request_id, OTel auto-instrumentation, and structured logger context binding. This is not a 'nice to have' — debugging is fundamentally degraded.
